hero.title: We Build Websites That
hero.subtitle: Premium web experiences engineered for search engines, AI discovery, and global audiences. Your brand, elevated.

services.title: Full-Stack Web Services
services.subtitle: From landing pages to complex web applications — we engineer digital experiences that drive results.
services.item_1_desc: Technical SEO from the ground up. Schema markup, Core Web Vitals optimization, semantic HTML, and structured data that search engines love.
services.item_2_desc: Generative Engine Optimization — built for AI search (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini). Entity-based content structures and AI-indexable markup.
services.item_3_desc: Native internationalization with hreflang tags, locale-aware routing, and professional translations. Reach every market.
services.item_4_desc: 100/100 Lighthouse scores. Sub-2s load times. Optimized assets, lazy loading, and CDN strategies for blazing-fast delivery.
services.item_5_desc: Pixel-perfect across all devices. Mobile-first architecture with fluid layouts that look stunning from phone to 4K.
services.item_6_desc: Clean, maintainable code. Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, React, Next.js, or whatever fits your project — we build it right.

features.title: Built for the Modern Web
features.subtitle: We don't just make websites pretty — we make them work harder for your business.
features.item_1_desc: Your site surfaces in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google SGE answers. GEO is the next frontier — we're already there.
features.item_2_desc: Every site we build supports multiple languages from day one. Switch between EN and 中文 right on this page.
features.item_3_desc: No bloat, no frameworks you don't need. Every line of code serves a purpose and is maintainable long-term.
features.item_4_desc: Rich results in Google Search. FAQ, How-To, Organization, and LocalBusiness schemas implemented correctly.

demo.title: i18n in Action
demo.subtitle: This entire page is available in multiple languages. Toggle between English and Traditional Chinese using the button above.
demo.note: Built with i18next — the industry-standard internationalization library.

contact.title: Ready to Build Something Great?
contact.subtitle: Let's talk about your project. We respond fast and give honest, straightforward advice.

footer.tagline: Premium web development for modern businesses.
footer.built_with: Built with clean code & attention to detail.
